headline: The Swiss canton attracting Dubai's ultra-wealthy
description: Known for its favorable tax system, Zug is attracting rich individuals looking for security and stability. The trend is also spreading to other regions of the country.

description: The United States is the biggest importer of French wines and spirits, according to the French wine export regulator, accounting for 21% of the overall export market last year.

headline: How two families have maintained their grip on Paris food markets for 35 years
description: Two companies are set to be awarded a new public service delegation contract, despite concerns from some left-wing and centrist elected officials.

headline: The summer dress theory
description: Lightweight and often floral, it fills the streets of France as soon as temperatures rise. But what if the sundress, archetype of so-called 'feminine' clothing, was also a political statement?

headline: Macron turns to renowned writers to chronicle his final year in office
description: Since summer 2025, the Elysée has invited prominent authors to accompany the French president and recount in the press the final key events of his term, tempting them with privileged access.

headline: At Dior, Jonathan Anderson is thinking long-term, not 'trendy'
description: One year after this arrival at Dior, the 41-year-old Northern Irish designer is still going at full throttle, releasing collections for Uniqlo and his own brand JW Anderson in addition to his 10 for the luxury label. His goal, he says, is to 'transform' the brand.

headline: The Knicks, the soul of New York, are NBA champions after more than half a century of waiting
description: After a long period of anticipation and frustration, New York, where basketball is so much more than just a sport, finally celebrates, following its 94-90 triumph on Saturday in Game 5 of the NBA Finals against Victor Wembanyama's Spurs.
